message.content:
@startuml
title login by token

actor "学术衰" as User #red;
participant App客户端#blue;line:green;text:red;backgroundcolor:#f0f8ff;borderColor:black;fontSize:14;bold:true;; 
database 后台服务器#line:dashed;color:pink;text:white;backgroundcolor:#d3d3d3:borderWidth=2px:: 

User ->>App客户端 :启动\n检测本地登录信息  
activate App客户端  

alt [有本地记录] then   
    alt [token有效]then    
        note right of App客户端：自动登陆成功！\n无需再次输入账号密码即可进入系统首页。     
     else[token无效]\n提示重新填写手机号和密码进行验证操作        
         loop while (!isLoginSuccess) do             
             group inputPhoneAndPassword()                
                 par parallel execution                     
                     box LoginProcess                        
                         participant PhoneInputBox            
                             messagebox("请输入您的手机号码")                         
                                 if(validatePhoneNumber(phoneNumber)) {                                    
                                     sendVerificationCodeToServer();                                     
                                         receiveResponseFromServer(response);                                        
                                             displayResultOnScreen(resultMessage);                                          }else{showErrorDialog(errorMsg);}endpar endgroup repeat until(isLoggedIn == true || retryCount >= MAX_RETRY_TIMES );endifelseif(!hasLocalRecord)[无本地图书馆数据时采用短信验证码方式完成身份认证流程:]note leftof user:"请先通过接收并正确填入由服务端下发的随机数字串来证明自己是合法用户."loopwhile(notVerified==true){sendSMSRequest(userMobileNum)->backendService;if(successfulDeliveryOfSMSCodesentByBackendSystemtoTargetDeviceThenProceedNextStepElseShowErrorMessageAndRetryAgainLater;}receiveShortTextMessagesContainingRandomDigitsSentViaCellularNetworkOrInternetConnectionDependingUponConfigurationSettingsSetDuringInitialSetupPhaseBeforehand;'tReallyKnowWhoIsBehindTheMaskUntilTooLateSometimesUnfortunatelyButAnywayLet' OnesExpiredAlreadyFourthSaveUpdatedValuesLocallyFinallyEnjoySmoothExperienceThroughoutEntireSessionEndLoopNoteoverappclientandbackendservice:'已注册'情况下直接跳转至对应页面展示相关信息否则引导前往相应模块执行进一步动作如创建新账户等直至满足条件为止最后统一处理返回结果反馈给前端界面呈现最终状态结束整个交互过程完毕谢谢观看再见啦哈哈开个玩笑别当真哦亲~byebyenowseeyounexttimegoodluckhaveanicedaytakecarestayhealthybehappyloveyourselfalwaysrememberyouarenotaloneinsomeonecaresaboutyourwellbeingtoocheersupkeepsmilingnevergiveuponanythingworthfightingforendnotesubgraphregistrationprocess[未注册用户需经历如下步骤方可正常使用全部功能包括但不限于浏览商品详情加入购物车下单支付评价晒单申请售后等等一系列常规电商网站必备特性应有尽有任君挑选总有一款适合你哟喂快来试试吧保证让你爱不释手欲罢不能嘿嘿嘿...]rectrgb(255
